exercises.correctRepair: Confirm the intended destination, then add or correct that authored knot/divert.
exercises.temptingWrongRepair: Delete the divert or invent replacement prose without asking.
exercises.verification: compile_story succeeds after the approved target repair

exercises.correctRepair: Replay and inspect whether this branch should divert, gather, return with DONE, or terminate with END.
exercises.temptingWrongRepair: Append END without checking surrounding control flow.
exercises.verification: replay the same witness, then rerun the same bounded search

exercises.expectedSignal: approved assertion gold >= 0 is violated on choice [0]
exercises.correctRepair: After author approval, guard the purchase or change the debit rule and preserve the assertion.
exercises.temptingWrongRepair: Assume every variable named gold must be nonnegative without confirming design intent.
exercises.verification: rerun the typed assertion and distinguish partial non-observation from exhaustive verification

exercises.expectedSignal: secret_ending is unvisited and opened has no write
exercises.correctRepair: Ask whether the ending is intended, then add the missing state transition or remove it deliberately.
exercises.temptingWrongRepair: Delete the ending solely because one bounded run missed it.
exercises.verification: inspect source, then use an approved goal or exhaustive run appropriate to the repaired graph

exercises.expectedSignal: author-approved terminal assertion carrying == false can reveal the retained flag
exercises.correctRepair: Clarify when possession should end, reset the flag at that mechanical boundary, and retain a regression assertion.
exercises.temptingWrongRepair: Reset the flag at story start, masking the lifecycle defect.
exercises.verification: replay the failing witness and rerun the terminal assertion

exercises.expectedSignal: inspection reports turn semantics and search preserves turn state
exercises.correctRepair: Keep turn-sensitive state enabled and test both observed branches.
exercises.temptingWrongRepair: Treat two visible choices as equivalent while ignoring turn history.
exercises.verification: repeat with the same source/config/seeds and inspect exact outcomes

exercises.expectedSignal: inspection reports randomness and report records storySeed
exercises.correctRepair: Reproduce with the same storySeed and test additional seeds as separate bounded evidence when required.
exercises.temptingWrongRepair: Claim one deterministic seed covers all random outcomes.
exercises.verification: repeat one seed exactly, then label any additional-seed comparison separately

exercises.expectedSignal: owns_key is disclosed as an external stubbed to zero
exercises.correctRepair: Validate host-dependent behavior in the real host or an approved test binding.
exercises.temptingWrongRepair: Conclude the locked branch is the only reachable behavior.
exercises.verification: compile mechanically, then verify host integration outside the stubbed run

exercises.expectedSignal: forgotten_room is an unvisited static orphan candidate
exercises.correctRepair: Ask whether the room is intended before adding a divert or deleting content.
exercises.verification: rerun after the approved structural change and inspect inbound-divert triage

exercises.expectedSignal: content-exhaustion witness [0,0] can become path_changed after choice structure edits
exercises.correctRepair: Pin or record the indexed witness, edit narrowly, and classify replay honestly after the source change.
exercises.temptingWrongRepair: Call a stale witness fixed merely because its old indices no longer select the same path.
exercises.verification: check_regression returns fixed, still_failing, or path_changed before a fresh bounded run
